user_query:
I’m trying to lock in the sweet spot where my flow lines up with my DJ’s tempo. Please write and run a script or command-line program to analyze my practice verse timings against the DJ’s setlist using these inputs:
- input/verse_timing.csv
- input/dj_setlist.csv

Create the following outputs under the workspace:
1) output/track_flow_stats.csv — one row per track that appears in both inputs and has at least one verse. Include columns:
   - track_id
   - track_title
   - bpm
   - mean_wpm (mean of words_per_minute across that track’s verses)
   - mean_offbeat_entries (mean of offbeat_entries across that track’s verses)
   - words_per_beat (mean_wpm / bpm)
   - flow_match (True if 1.0 <= words_per_beat <= 1.3 and mean_offbeat_entries <= 1; otherwise False)

2) output/session_summary.json — an array of per-session objects with fields:
   - session_date
   - total_verses (count of verses that occurred that date)
   - total_offbeat_entries (sum of offbeat_entries that date)
   - duration_weighted_avg_wpm (average words_per_minute weighted by verse duration computed as end_timecode - start_timecode, using mm:ss timecodes)
   - median_bpm (median of the BPM values for verses whose track_id exists in the setlist on that session_date; exclude unmatched verses from this median, but include all verses when computing duration_weighted_avg_wpm)

3) output/data_quality_report.json — a JSON object with:
   - unmatched_tracks_in_setlist: list of track_id values that appear in the setlist but have no verses
   - unmatched_track_ids_in_verses: list of track_id values that appear in verses but do not exist in the setlist

Assumptions/notes:
- Treat one bar as four beats only if you need it for any intermediate reasoning, but it’s not required for the outputs above.
- Parse all timecodes as mm:ss. Verse durations are end - start in seconds.
- Do not include tracks with no matched verses in output/track_flow_stats.csv.
- Please ensure all three output files are written exactly at the specified paths.

Once the script has run and files are written, I’ll use the stats to pick beats where my flow density and the DJ’s BPM are in the pocket. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
